dimensions.statistic: global annual mean anomaly of tas vs cumulative fco2antt

executions/recipe/work/tcre/calculate/MP.long_name: Global annual mean near-surface air temperature anomaly ΔT vs. global annual cumulative CO2 emissions E of the emission-driven 1% CO2 increase per year experiment. The transient climate response to cumulative CO2 Emissions (TCRE) is defined as the 20-year average ΔT centered at the time where cumulative CO2 emissions E reach 1000 PgC (i.e., after 55 years).

executions/recipe/work/tcre/calculate/tc.long_name: Transient Climate Response to Cumulative CO2 Emissions (TCRE) for multiple datasets.

<OUTPUT_DIR>/executions/recipe/index.htm.description: Page showing the executions of the ESMValTool run.

executions/recipe/plots/tcre/calculate/t.long_name: Global annual mean near-surface air temperature anomaly ΔT vs. global annual cumulative CO2 emissions E of the emission-driven 1% CO2 increase per year experiment. The transient climate response to cumulative CO2 Emissions (TCRE) is defined as the 20-year average ΔT centered at the time where cumulative CO2 emissions E reach 1000 PgC (i.e., after 55 years).
